prompt:
Every label coming off the shelf printer this morning says "undefined" where the printed price belongs, and the little size suffix — the "(250 g)" bit shoppers actually read — has disappeared off every label that used to have one. Products without a size in the name are the only ones that look right, minus the price.

Context: the pricing service merges the price into the label at print time via the printer's own token, so the renderer never knows prices. This all worked before I rewrote the renderer from the old Perl script into promoline.ts last week; nothing about the printer or the feed changed. The supplier feed rows look the same as always.

Would appreciate a fix rather than a workaround — `node --test test_promoline.ts` is the contract and has to pass as-is. Don't touch the test file.
